final_message:
Both bugs fixed in `lrucache/cache.py`:

1. `get()` wasn't calling `move_to_end`, so reads didn't refresh recency.
2. `put()` evicted an entry even when just updating an existing key at full capacity, since it didn't check whether the key was already present before evicting.

`python3 -m pytest -q` now passes (6 passed), and `SOLUTION.md` documents the root causes.
